texto: It was time for me to make my stand
autor: to display my integrity and dignity as a human worthful of respect. It was time for me to aggress the predatory lions and destroy them once and for all.
explicacao: Citação de to display my integrity and dignity as a human worthful of respect. It was time for me to aggress the predatory lions and destroy them once and for all. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “It was time for me to make my stand” articula reflexao, yanan-melo, stand em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
